prompt: A high-fashion surrealist poster for Rolex. A deep emerald green minimalist studio with a polished reflective floor. A massive Rolex watch stands upright like a monument. A male model in a tailored dark green suit leans casually against the watch face, wearing a matching Rolex. In the background, bold “ROLEX” typography appears in large elegant serif type, partially occluded. Top right: “Designed with ChatGPT”. Bottom center tagline: “Time, perfected. Presence, defined.” Moody luxury lighting, rich tones, cinematic reflections. Aspect ratio: 3:4
